info.name: Society Management System - 57 Features API Testing
info.description: Comprehensive Postman collection mapping all 57 system APIs for the Society Management System.

exec: var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.test("Register successful", function () { pm.expect(jsonData.success).to.be.true; });
var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.test("Login successful", function () { pm.expect(jsonData.success).to.be.true; });

request.description: Fetch profile, flat details, family members, and vehicle counts.
Add a family member or co-resident to the resident's flat.

exec: var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.test("Family member added successfully", function () { pm.expect(jsonData.success).to.be.true; });
var jsonData = pm.response.json(); if (jsonData && jsonData.data && jsonData.data.familyMember) { pm.collectionVariables.set("familyMemberId", jsonData.data.familyMember._id); }

request.description: List all family members added to the current flat.
Update details of a family member.
Remove a family member from the flat records.
Add owned vehicle with color, brand, type and number plate verification.

exec: var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.test("Vehicle added successfully", function () { pm.expect(jsonData.success).to.be.true; });
var jsonData = pm.response.json(); if (jsonData && jsonData.data && jsonData.data.vehicle) { pm.collectionVariables.set("vehicleId", jsonData.data.vehicle._id); }

request.description: List all registered vehicles for the current resident.
Manage owner or tenant status through profile update details.
Upload KYC documents like Aadhaar, PAN or Passport.
List all uploaded KYC records for the current flat.
Submit move out date and reason for admin approval (Owner only).

exec: var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.test("Move-out request created", function () { pm.expect(jsonData.success).to.be.true; });
var jsonData = pm.response.json(); if (jsonData && jsonData.data && jsonData.data.moveOutRequest) { pm.collectionVariables.set("moveOutId", jsonData.data.moveOutRequest._id); }
var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.test("Listing created", function () { pm.expect(jsonData.success).to.be.true; });
var jsonData = pm.response.json(); if (jsonData && jsonData.data && jsonData.data.listing) { pm.collectionVariables.set("listingId", jsonData.data.listing._id); }

request.description: Generate a secure tokenized sharing link for prospective buyers/tenants.

exec: var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.test("Document shared", function () { pm.expect(jsonData.success).to.be.true; });

var jsonData = pm.response.json(); if (jsonData && jsonData.data && jsonData.data.sharedDocument) { pm.collectionVariables.set("sharedDocumentId", jsonData.data.sharedDocument._id); pm.collectionVariables.set("sharedDocumentToken", jsonData.data.sharedDocument.shareToken); }

request.description: List generated flat document sharing links.
Unauthenticated public resolver endpoint to access the shared flat document.
View outstanding maintenance dues and bills.

exec: var jsonData = pm.response.json(); if (jsonData && jsonData.data && jsonData.data.outstandingBills && jsonData.data.outstandingBills.length > 0) { pm.collectionVariables.set("billId", jsonData.data.outstandingBills[0]._id); }

request.description: Initiate payment to get secure cryptographic proof signature.

exec: var jsonData = pm.response.json(); if (jsonData && jsonData.data && jsonData.data.paymentSignature) { pm.collectionVariables.set("paymentSignature", jsonData.data.paymentSignature); }

request.description: Pay maintenance online using dummy gateway signature verification.

exec: var jsonData = pm.response.json(); if (jsonData && jsonData.data && jsonData.data.receipt) { pm.collectionVariables.set("receiptId", jsonData.data.receipt._id); }

request.description: Fetch payment receipt file details and paths.
Fetch automatic billing and recurring payment configurations.
Get all maintenance bills showing due amounts, penalties and detailed fees.

exec: var jsonData = pm.response.json(); if (jsonData && jsonData.data && jsonData.data.bills && jsonData.data.bills.length > 0) { pm.collectionVariables.set("billId", jsonData.data.bills[0]._id); }

request.description: Raise dispute against wrong billing calculations.
Upload reading with current bounds checks.
Pre-approve guests, delivery helpers, or visitors.

exec: var jsonData = pm.response.json(); if (jsonData && jsonData.data && jsonData.data.visitor) { pm.collectionVariables.set("visitorId", jsonData.data.visitor._id); }
var jsonData = pm.response.json(); if (jsonData && jsonData.data && jsonData.data.otp) { pm.collectionVariables.set("visitorOtp", jsonData.data.otp); }
